definitions.text: At the same time, in the same place; in close association or proximity.
examples: We can't all talk together; let's take turns politely.

definitions.text: Into one place; into a single thing; combined.
examples: He put all the parts together.

definitions.text: In a relationship or partnership, for example a business relationship or a romantic partnership.
examples: Bob and Andy went into business together. Jenny and Mark have been together since they went on holiday to Mexico.
